message:
✨ Add per-run metadata to nightly E2E detail panel (#1120)

Backend: Add model/gpuType/gpuCount/event fields to NightlyRun struct,
populated per-run from workflow defaults. Includes GitHub Actions event
type (schedule vs workflow_dispatch).

Frontend: RunDot now accepts hover callbacks. GuideDetailPanel tracks
hovered run state — when hovering a specific run dot in the detail panel,
the infrastructure section (model, GPU, duration) updates to show that
run's specific metadata instead of the guide-level defaults. The avg
duration remains visible when no dot is hovered.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -81,6 +81,10 @@ export function useNightlyE2EData() {
                       htmlUrl: r.htmlUrl,
                       runNumber: r.runNumber,
                       failureReason: r.failureReason || '',
+                      model: r.model ?? g.model ?? 'Unknown',
+                      gpuType: r.gpuType ?? g.gpuType ?? 'Unknown',
+                      gpuCount: r.gpuCount ?? g.gpuCount ?? 0,
+                      event: r.event ?? 'schedule',
                     })
                   ),
                   passRate: g.passRate,

@@ -890,6 +890,8 @@
     "model": "Model",
     "gpu": "GPU",
     "avgDuration": "Avg duration",
+    "duration": "Duration",
+    "hoverDotForDetails": "hover dot for details",
     "lastPass": "Last pass",
     "lastFail": "Last fail",
     "totalRuns": "Total runs",
